name: bmc-humanize-kit
description: Branded Mayhem Collective — Humanize Kit. Free, public, MIT. The free gateway to the paid Branded Mayhem skill lineup (https://brandedmayhem.com). Submitted to Anthropic's claude-community marketplace for free distribution.

plugins.name: humanize-kit
plugins.description: AI pattern interrupter: builds a voice fingerprint from your real writing and rewrites AI output to match it. Three skills: humanize, humanize-ig, voice-profiler.
